---
title: "DataBankPropertiesWidget"
---

## Overview

`dl::widget::DataBankPropertiesWidget` is the properties-panel section for the
deep learning memory bank. It is embedded in `DeepLearningPropertiesWidget`
between the weights controls and the dynamic slot scroll area.

**Location:** `src/WhiskerToolbox/DeepLearning_Widget/UI/DataBank/`

## API

| Method | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `setAssembler()` | Connect to the session `SlotAssembler` for capture |
| `setDataManager()` | Bind DataManager for the data-source combo |
| `setStaticSlots()` | Populate the target static-slot combo from model metadata |
| `setModelReady()` | Enable capture when weights are loaded |
| `setCurrentFrame()` | Frame index used for capture |
| `refreshDataSources()` | Re-populate the data-source combo |
| `refreshCaptureStatus()` | Update status label for the selected entry ID |

## Signals

| Signal | Emitted when |
|---|---|
| `dataBankChanged()` | After a successful capture or when bank contents change |

## Capture workflow

1. Select a **target slot** (static model input, e.g. `memory_masks`).
2. For sequence static slots, set the **memory index** (0-based position).
3. The **entry ID** defaults to `{slot_name}_{memory_index}`.
4. Choose a **data source** from DataManager (filtered by the slot encoder).
5. Click **Capture Current Frame** to call `SlotAssembler::captureToBank()`.

`dataBankChanged` is emitted on success. The parent forwards this to
`DeepLearningViewWidget::refreshDataBankView()` and refreshes `bank_entry_id`
combos on memory input slot widgets.
